response.step_by_step_log: Identified opening cinematic (00:00-04:25). At 04:26, performance begins by VTuber Ayunda Risu. Recognized song as 'Gurenge' (LiSA) via lyrics 'Tsuyoku nareru riyuu wo shitta'. Performed search: 'Gurenge LiSA Japanese and English lyrics'.
response.global_summary: A cinematic introduction 'The Rise of the Nyut Warrior' followed by a musical performance of 'Gurenge' by VTuber Ayunda Risu.

scenes.description: Introductory text and cinematic setting establishing the scene for 'The Rise of the Nyut Warrior'.
Ayunda Risu performs the song 'Gurenge' in a burning village setting.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
強くなれる理由を知った
僕を連れて進め
泥だらけの走馬灯に酔う
こわばる心
震える手は掴みたいものがある
それだけさ
夜の匂い空睨んでも
変わっていけるのは自分自身だけ
それだけさ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I found the reason I can become strong
Take me with you and move forward
I'm drunk on the muddy memories
My stiff heart
My trembling hand wants to grasp something
That's all
Even if I glare at the smell of the night in the sky
The only one who can change is myself
That's all
